title: Modelled estimates of recent births
short_description: Modelled estimates of annual live births by year ending date derived from GP registration data to provide more timely birth trend estimates than ONS figures.
long_description: Modelled estimates of annual live births by year ending date. Official birth estimates from ONS have a 9-12 month lag, so the GLA Demography team produces modelled estimates based on counts of infants registered with GP practices. Modelled estimates can be produced with the same frequency and latency as NHS Digital data releases.

long_description: Anti-social behaviour (ASB) is defined as behaviour causing or likely to cause harassment, alarm or distress to persons not of the same household. Data covers the most recent 12 months at ward and borough level.
